text.title: schema-version-pinning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for schema-version-pinning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tracking schema version in a sidecar header (HTTP header, Kafka header, file metadata) outside the payload.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sidecars are stripped by the first naive `payload = response.json()` consumer; in-payload version travels with the data and survives every serialization round-trip.
